description_long: This bungalow features a broad, low-pitched roof with deep overhangs and a prominent gable, characteristic of Craftsman-style architecture. The roof is clad in dark brown tiles, bordered by a thick white trim that accentuates its geometric lines. The front facade showcases a central entrance with a small porch, flanked by large, rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The structure sits on a neatly manicured lawn, with a paved walkway leading to the front door and rows of small trees lining the path. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and dark brown, creating a striking contrast and emphasizing the horizontal lines of the design. The overall appearance is solid and inviting, with a focus on symmetry and clean, modern lines.
description: A Craftsman-style bungalow with a wide, dark brown gabled roof, white trim, and large front windows, set on a landscaped lawn with a central walkway.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the expansive, sloped roof and the white trim, with a glimpse of the landscaped yard and tree-lined path.
description_view_1: The front view displays the central entrance, small porch, symmetrical large windows, and the inviting walkway leading up to the door.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the bungalow, dominated by the wide roof and white trim, with minimal window openings visible.
description_view_3: The opposite front angle emphasizes the walkway, porch, and symmetrical landscaping, providing a clear view of the main entrance and window arrangement.
